balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.blurb: Classic build: a weekly long run plus alternating tempo and interval days.

polarized.label: Polarized 80/20
polarized.blurb: Mostly genuinely easy running with one hard session a week — great if you tend to run everything moderately hard.

runwalk.label: Run/Walk
runwalk.blurb: Gentle run/walk intervals and no speedwork — finish feeling strong. Ideal when starting out or returning.

lowfreq.label: 3-Day Quality
lowfreq.blurb: Three purposeful runs a week — intervals, tempo, long — other days optional cross-training. Best with exactly 3 run days.

hansons.label: Hansons-style
hansons.blurb: Higher frequency, a capped moderate long run and tempo at goal race pace. Best at 5–6 days for half/marathon.

occasional.label: Now and then
occasional.sub: A run every week or two
